statement.markdown: Given the head of a singly linked list, remove the node at a specified position. If the position is 0, remove the head; if the position is equal to the length of the list, remove the tail.
statement.inputFormat:
Head of a singly linked list, and a position n.
Example: head = 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> 4 -> 5, n = 2
statement.outputFormat:
The head of the modified list after removing the node at position n.
Example: 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> 5
statement.notes: You may not be given the head of the list, only the node to be removed.

constraints.description: Position of the node to be removed

functionSignature.python: def removeAt(self, head: ListNode, n: int) -> ListNode:
